name: film-video-production
description: Film & Video Production specialist team — 4 agents (production-lead, line-producer, post-production-supervisor, production-finance-analyst), 5 skills, 3 templates, 5 commands, 1 advisory hook, 8 best-practice rules, and a 4-file research-grounded knowledge bank. A production-management team for a producer, production company, or post house — it budgets to a defensible top-sheet, schedules to the shoot day rather than the calendar, runs the post pipeline as a dependency chain, and reads production economics the way a line producer who answers for every dollar on the day must. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
